report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets, 1 institutional thread, Discord/TG announcement, newsletter section, and 3 social visual cards focused on whale accumulation during Extreme Fear, Morgan Stanley MSBT ETF milestone, and weekly content roundup.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet: Iran deadline relief — BTC held $67K through peak geopolitical stress, relief rally setup
Tweet: Whale accumulation — 8,400+ BTC added during Extreme Fear (F&G: 10), ETF inflows stayed positive
Tweet: Monday content roundup — 6 new guides published this week (SEC commodities, MSBT ETF, Solana Blinks, NFTFi, MegaETH, Story Protocol)
Tweet: DCA Calculator spotlight — Extreme Fear as historically optimal accumulation zone
Tweet: Morgan Stanley MSBT follow-up — 24K+ advisors, $8T AUM, $160B potential demand
Thread (5-part): Institutional Bitcoin wave accelerating — MSBT + SEC commodities + CLARITY Act + smart money behavior
Discord/Telegram: Evening update with market snapshot, whale data, new guides list
Newsletter section: Weekly digest for Thu Mar 27 — Morgan Stanley headline, geopolitical relief, regulatory roundup, 4 new guides, degen corner

sections.title: Social Visual Cards Created
